PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/etc/ololo'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('present')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/etc/ololo'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('present')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiPuppetHashArgumentImpl(HASH_ARGUMENT)
            PsiElement(*)('*')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''mode'')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                  PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('755')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''owner'')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ol'')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('group')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''grgr'')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/etc/ololo'')
        PsiElement(:)(':')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
          PsiPuppetHashArgumentImpl(HASH_ARGUMENT)
            PsiElement(*)('*')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
              PsiElement({)('{')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''mode'')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                  PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('755')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''owner'')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiElement(=>)('=>')
                PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
                PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
                  PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ol'')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiElement(})('}')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('ensure')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('present')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
            PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(NAME)('group')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(=>)('=>')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''grgr'')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# This should be a syntax error since redefinitions with hash setting is not allowed')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
    PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
      PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
      PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
          PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''/etc/ololo'')
        PsiElement(])(']')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      Puppet: RESOURCE_INSTANCE_DECLARATION
        PsiPuppetExpressionUnaryImpl(EXPRESSION_UNARY)
          PsiElement(*)('*')
          PsiErrorElement:'.', ':', <expression> or '[' expected, got '=>'
            <empty list>
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiErrorElement:';' expected, got ''mode''
        PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''mode'')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('755')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''owner'')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(=>)('=>')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''ol'')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiErrorElement:Unknown tokens
    PsiElement(,)(',')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiErrorElement:Unknown tokens
    PsiElement(})('}')
